# pIvotX

> pIvotX is a lightweight 2D game engine (~52 KB minified, zero runtime
> dependencies) for Vanilla JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and React
> Native/Expo. Version 2.0 includes physics (one-way & moving platforms,
> raycasts, swept casts, spatial hashing), input engines (keyboard, gamepad
> with rumble, pointer, rebindable action maps), a canvas UI widget system
> (buttons, sliders, progress bars, virtual joystick, nine-slice panels),
> a Web Audio sound engine (one-shots, audio sprites, fades, pitch, stereo
> pan, sound buses), particles, tweens, timers, scene management, and a
> camera with shake/zoom/dead-zone follow.

Install: `npm i @colon-dev/pivotx` — entries: `@colon-dev/pivotx` (core),
`@colon-dev/pivotx/react`, `@colon-dev/pivotx/react-native`.
CDN: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@colon-dev/pivotx@2/dist/pivotx.umd.min.js`
(global `PivotX`). License: MIT.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/getting-started): install, four platform targets, a 60-second first game
- [What's New in 2.0](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/whats-new): engine overview and upgrade notes (fully backwards-compatible)
- [Vanilla JS Guide](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/vanilla-js): complete mini-platformer from one script tag
- [TypeScript Guide](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/typescript): typed entities and custom drawables
- [Core API Reference](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/core-api): Canvas, shapes, sprites, tilemaps
- [Input Engine](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/input-engine): Keyboard, GamepadInput, Pointer, InputMap
- [UI Engine](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/ui-engine): UIManager and widgets, anchoring, keyboard navigation
- [Sound Engine](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/sound-engine): one-shots, audio sprites, fades, sound groups
- [Physics Engine](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/physics-engine): stepBody, moving platforms, raycasts, SpatialHash
- [Game Utilities](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/game-utilities): Vec2, Timers, tweens, particles, scenes
- [React Guide](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/react-guide): PivotCanvas, hooks, JSX UI widgets
- [React Native Guide](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/react-native-guide): WebView bridge, NativeInput, audio bridge
- [Game Patterns](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/patterns): scenes, rebindable controls, juice, broad-phase collision
- [Full Platformer Example](https://pivotx.colondev.com/docs/2.0.0/platformer-example): complete game in ~90 lines

## Tutorials (live playable demos with code walkthroughs)

- [V2 Playground](https://pivotx.colondev.com/tutorial/v2playground): the 2.0 engines in one game — input, UI, sound, physics
- [All tutorials](https://pivotx.colondev.com/tutorials): 10 games from beginner (bouncing ball) to advanced (roguelike, racing, tactics)

## Source & package

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ColonDev-Community/pIvotX): source, README with full API tables, CHANGELOG
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@colon-dev/pivotx): @colon-dev/pivotx

## Quick example

```js
const { Canvas, Point, Rectangle, Keyboard, stepBody } = PivotX;
const canvas = new Canvas('game');
const player = { x: 60, y: 100, vx: 0, vy: 0, width: 28, height: 28, grounded: false };
const platforms = [
  { x: 0, y: 360, w: 600, h: 40 },
  { x: 200, y: 280, w: 120, h: 14, oneWay: true },   // jump-through
  { x: 400, y: 220, w: 100, h: 16, vx: 60 },         // moving platform — carries the player
];
canvas.startLoop((dt) => {
  canvas.clear();
  player.vx = 240 * Keyboard.getAxis('horizontal');   // arrows + WASD, no listeners
  if (Keyboard.justPressed('space') && player.grounded) player.vy = -560;
  stepBody(player, platforms, dt, { gravity: 1400, maxFallSpeed: 900 });
  const r = new Rectangle(Point(player.x, player.y), 28, 28);
  r.fillColor = '#38bdf8';
  canvas.add(r);
});
```
